description: A vertical graphic combining a photograph with slogan typography and three clipped news headlines. The top portion is a color photograph of Donald Trump (navy suit, red tie) walking and gesturing among steel-mill workers wearing orange high-visibility coveralls and hard hats, with a large American flag and rolled steel coils in the background. A dark navy gradient covers the lower portion, where white serif typography reads italic 'The Most Pro-Worker Legislation' above bold all-caps 'IN HISTORY!'. Below are three torn-paper-style headline clippings: (1) 'FOX NEWS - Service industry workers reaping the benefits of Trump's 'no tax on tips''; (2) 'KLTV - ‘Big Beautiful Bill’ will no longer tax overtime, tips'; (3) 'THE COLLEGE FIX - $500 billion now available for trade schools, thanks to Trump budget'.
notable_text: The Most Pro-Worker Legislation IN HISTORY!; FOX NEWS - Service industry workers reaping the benefits of Trump's 'no tax on tips'; KLTV - ‘Big Beautiful Bill’ will no longer tax overtime, tips; THE COLLEGE FIX - $500 billion now available for trade schools, thanks to Trump budget
